title: Israel in Egypt
objective: Understand how the Israelites became slaves in Egypt.

sections.content: After Joseph's time, the Israelites became enslaved in Egypt.

sections.text: They ruthlessly made the people of Israel work as slaves.

sections.heading: God Hears His People
sections.content: Even in suffering, God hears the cries of His people.

questions: How does God respond to suffering?

sections.content: Lord, hear the cries of those who suffer. Amen.
Moses was saved from Pharaoh's decree to kill Hebrew children.

sections.heading: God's Protection
sections.content: God preserved Moses for a future purpose.

questions: What does this teach about God's plan?

sections.content: God, thank You for guiding history according to Your will. Amen.
God spoke to Moses through a burning bush.

sections.heading: God Reveals His Name
sections.content: God revealed His divine name and called Moses to lead Israel.

questions: How does God call people today?

sections.content: Lord, help us respond faithfully when You call. Amen.

title: The Ten Plagues
objective: See how God demonstrated His power over Egypt.

sections.content: God sent plagues to show His power and deliver Israel.

sections.text: The Egyptians shall know that I am the Lord.

sections.heading: God's Power
sections.content: The plagues showed that the Lord alone is God.

questions: What did they show about God?

sections.content: Almighty God, show us Your power and mercy. Amen.

title: The Passover
objective: Understand the meaning of the Passover.

sections.content: God instructed Israel to sacrifice a lamb and mark their doors.

sections.text: When I see the blood, I will pass over you.

sections.heading: The Passover Lamb
sections.content: The Passover points forward to Jesus, the Lamb of God.

questions: How does this point to Christ?

sections.content: Thank You, Lord, for the sacrifice of Christ. Amen.
God parted the Red Sea so Israel could escape Egypt.

sections.text: The Lord drove the sea back by a strong east wind.

sections.heading: Deliverance
sections.content: God powerfully rescued His people.

questions: What does it show about God's power?

sections.content: Lord, deliver us from sin and danger. Amen.

title: The Ten Commandments
objective: Understand God's Law given at Sinai.

sections.content: God gave His commandments to guide His people.

sections.text: You shall have no other gods before me.

sections.heading: God's Law
sections.content: The commandments show God's will and reveal our sin.

questions: Why did God give the commandments?

sections.content: Lord, help us follow Your commandments. Amen.

title: The Tabernacle
objective: Learn about God's presence among His people.

sections.content: God instructed Israel to build the Tabernacle.

sections.text: Let them make me a sanctuary.

sections.heading: God Dwells With His People
sections.content: The Tabernacle showed that God desired to dwell with His people.

questions: Why did God command the Tabernacle?
How does God dwell with believers today?

sections.content: Lord, thank You for dwelling with Your people. Amen.
